card.rightdescription: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit. If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!
card.title: CONBOOK
card.description1: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit.
card.description2: If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!

rules.title: CONBOOK SUBMISSION GUIDELINES
rules.item2: ● Size: A5 (2480x3508px), landscape or portrait are both accepted.
rules.item5: ● Other accepted submissions: illustrations, photography, short writing
rules.item8: ● The work must be your own and must not have been publicly posted on any platform before FUVE 2026.
rules.item9: ● Submissions to FUVE must be final versions, not sketches or drafts.
rules.item10: ● For written pieces, please keep the length around 300-500 words and submit as a Word file.
rules.item11: ● For photography, please clearly include credits for the photographer, model, or fursuiter.
rules.item12: ● Including the FUVE mascot is optional, but the work should relate to the event theme.
rules.item13: ● All submissions may be shown in the closing video or included in a post-event folder on the page. However, only a limited number of works can be selected for the printed handbook.
rules.item14: ● Your work may be used in non-profit event materials (including social media communication, handbook cover/content, and printed promotional materials such as posters, invitations, and wristbands). We will request your permission by email if your work is selected.
rules.item15: ● Your submission may be rejected if author information is missing, if it violates the code of conduct, or if it contains sensitive themes such as violence, politics, or religion.
rules.item16: ● Thank you for contributing your work and time to support FUVE.

info.timeDetail: Doors open at 10:00 AM. Event ends at 8:00 PM.

artbook.title: CONBOOK
artbook.description: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit. If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!

dealer.title: DEALER’S DEN
dealer.description: Dealer’s Den is the marketplace area for furry artists and creators, where you can explore and purchase unique items. If you’re an artist or creator with products to showcase and want to connect directly with attendees, don’t hesitate to register your Dealer Den booth and be part of the event!

talent.title: TALENT SHOW
talent.description: Talent Show is the stage program where you can freely display your talents and personality—from singing, dancing, instrument performances, to acting and other creative acts. FUVE supports everyone shining, sharing passion, and spreading positive energy to the community.

theme.title: Breeze of Homeland
theme.description_1: Inspired by the winds carrying the familiar scent of the Vietnamese countryside.
theme.description_2: In 2026, follow Lang to visit Gió Đồng - the most vibrant furry village festival on earth! FUVE will bring a space infused with the soul of Vietnam, inviting you to immerse yourself where reality and dreams intertwine. A joyful festival that makes you forget the way home awaits beneath this communal house roof!
